category_sources: Official GitHub README says the project was formerly a Bash script for downloading MP3s from OverDrive and notes the service status as of early 2025.
source_facts.description says it downloads MP3s from the OverDrive audiobook service.
docs_sources: Current official README is short and points to the old README for historical usage.
Official repository links the 2.4.1 README as the old documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/chbrown/overdrive; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README describes the project as formerly a Bash script for OverDrive MP3 downloads.
source_facts.description identifies Bash, MP3 download, and OverDrive audiobook service.
